pages.title: Introduction
pages.subtitle: Welcome to the Security Management System documentation
pages.content:
## Overview

Welcome to the **Security Management System** (SMS) — a comprehensive platform for managing security operations, personnel, incidents, and more.

## What You Can Do

- Manage guards and their schedules
- Track real-time patrol routes and checkpoints
- Log and resolve security incidents with full audit trails
- Generate compliance and client billing reports
- Configure sites, zones, and access control rules

## Navigation

Use the sidebar to navigate through the documentation sections. Each category groups related topics together.

> **Note:** This is a sample page. You can edit or delete it from the admin panel at `/admin/login.html`.
